docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORONADO, JUAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO ADD NEW DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORONADO, JUAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-21-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF JUAN CORONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE GONZALES DBS PEPE'S AUTO REPAIR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,635.00 FILED BY CORONADO, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, JOSE DBA PEPE'S AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-30-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAN CORONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME ORLAN IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY DANIEL NAVARROR, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT JOSE GONZALES IS PRSENT ON HIS OWN BEHALF ANF HAS JOSE GONZALES DBA PEPE'S AUTO REPAIR. JAIME ORLAN WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND JAIME ORLAN PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY-3017 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE NOT UPHELD PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST A JUDGMENT AGAINST JAIME ORLAN ONLY. JAMIE ORLAN WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO JAIME ORLAN ON 3/22/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED NOV-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, JOSE DBA PEPE'S AUTO REPAIR
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,635.00 FILED BY CORONADO, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, JOSE DBA PEPE'S AUTO REPAIR GONZALES, JOSE ORLAN, JAIME

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND JAIME ORLAN PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM ON MAR-22-17 AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY-30-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JON POLLAND; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
